name: Bad Government
short_description: Manage your resources and navigate the shifting sentiment of the population in this decision-based resource management game. Gain power to unlock more individuals, adding complexity as you progress. How long can you maintain balance?
detailed_description:
In this decision-based resource management game, you'll need to carefully balance resources while keeping a close eye on the shifting sentiments of the population. As you gain more power, you unlock new individuals, each adding a layer of complexity to your management strategy. With increasing challenges, growing responsibilities, and evolving dynamics, only the sharpest strategists can maintain harmony.

As you take control, you’ll need to balance the ever-changing favor of both the people and the elites. Keep an eye on your budget, debt, gold reserves, and more, as you navigate the intricacies of governance. Your ultimate goal? Amass power while managing the special interests of ministers, activists, lobbyists, your neighbors, the deep state, contract killers, and even gold-obsessed aliens.

At the end of the day, the decisions are yours—most of the time, at least.
